# 3BOX AI

> 3BOX AI is an AI-powered career operating system by OFORO AI. It provides free AI resume building, personalized career coaching, skill assessment, adaptive learning paths, and AI-powered job matching with automated applications.

## Product Overview

3BOX AI takes users through a complete career pipeline: Skill Assessment → Personalized Career Plan → Adaptive Learning → Resume & Portfolio Building → AI Job Matching → Automated Applications.

## Key Features

- **AI Resume Builder**: Free ATS-optimized resume builder with AI keyword optimization, job-specific tailoring, and PDF export.
- **AI Career Coach (Cortex)**: Persistent AI coach that learns user goals, tracks progress, and predicts hire probability.
- **AI Skill Assessment**: Adaptive testing with MCQ, scenarios, and hands-on tasks. Instant skill scoring and gap analysis.
- **AI Career Plan Generator**: Personalized career roadmaps with milestones, proof-of-work projects, and timeline estimates.
- **Adaptive AI Learning Paths**: Personalized learning recommendations that evolve with user progress.
- **AI Job Matching**: Skills-based job matching with fit scores, improvement suggestions, and explainable matching.
- **Automated Job Applications**: AI-powered auto-apply with compliance controls, audit trails, and smart targeting.
- **6 AI Agents**: Scout (job discovery), Forge (resume optimization), Archer (auto-apply), Atlas (career planning), Sage (coaching), Sentinel (quality monitoring) — all available on every plan.
- **Market Readiness Score**: Real-time AI employability scoring against market demand.
- **Hire Probability Forecasting**: Know chances before applying with AI probability estimates.

## Pricing

- **Free ($0)**: 10 lifetime applications, all AI features, all 6 agents, 1 resume, basic career plan
- **Pro ($29/month)**: 20 applications/day, unlimited resumes, all templates, job matching, interview prep
- **Max ($59/month)**: 50 applications/day, unlimited everything, priority support, advanced analytics

All plans use Claude Sonnet AI. Student discount: 30% off Pro and Max with .edu email.

## Technology

Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, NextAuth.js, OpenRouter AI (Claude Sonnet), Stripe billing, BullMQ queues, and Redis caching.

## Company

3BOX AI is a product of OFORO AI (https://oforo.ai).
